title: OrchardSpendingKey::to_bytes pub; spending key ref with no zeroization contract
description: orchard.rs:76 OrchardSpendingKey::to_bytes() is pub and returns &[u8;32] into the Zeroizing-wrapped inner field. A caller can trivially copy: let copied: [u8;32] = *sk.to_bytes(). Comment says 'Never log this value' but has no mechanical enforcement. Either restrict to pub(crate) if external access is not needed, or return a newtype that doesn't implement Copy.
